name: Unity MCP
description: AI-powered Unity Editor automation via MCP - manage GameObjects, scripts, materials, scenes, prefabs, VFX, and run tests

tools.name: apply_text_edits
tools.description: Apply text edits to script content

tools.name: batch_execute
tools.description: Execute multiple Unity operations in a single batch

tools.name: create_script
tools.description: Create new C# scripts

tools.name: debug_request_context
tools.description: Debug and inspect MCP request context

tools.name: delete_script
tools.description: Delete C# scripts

tools.name: execute_custom_tool
tools.description: Execute custom Unity Editor tools registered by the project

tools.name: execute_code
tools.description: Execute arbitrary C# code inside the Unity Editor with access to all Unity APIs

tools.name: execute_menu_item
tools.description: Execute Unity Editor menu items

tools.name: find_gameobjects
tools.description: Find GameObjects in the scene by various criteria

tools.name: find_in_file
tools.description: Search for content within Unity project files

tools.name: get_sha
tools.description: Get SHA hash of script content

tools.name: get_test_job
tools.description: Get status of async test job

tools.name: manage_animation
tools.description: Manage Unity animation: Animator control, AnimatorController CRUD, and AnimationClip operations

tools.name: manage_asset
tools.description: Create, modify, search, and organize Unity assets

tools.name: manage_build
tools.description: Manage player builds: trigger builds, switch platforms, configure settings, batch builds

tools.name: manage_components
tools.description: Add, remove, and configure GameObject components

tools.name: manage_editor
tools.description: Control Unity Editor state, play mode, preferences, undo/redo

tools.name: manage_gameobject
tools.description: Create, modify, transform, and delete GameObjects

tools.name: manage_camera
tools.description: Manage cameras (Unity Camera + Cinemachine) with presets, pipelines, and blending

tools.name: manage_graphics
tools.description: Manage rendering graphics: volumes, post-processing, light baking, rendering stats, pipeline settings, and URP renderer features

tools.name: manage_material
tools.description: Create and modify Unity materials and shaders

tools.name: manage_packages
tools.description: Modify Unity packages: install, remove, embed, and configure registries

tools.name: manage_physics
tools.description: Manage 3D and 2D physics: settings, collision matrix, materials, joints, queries (raycast, shapecast, linecast, overlap), forces, rigidbody configuration, validation, and simulation

tools.name: manage_prefabs
tools.description: Create, instantiate, unpack, and modify prefabs

tools.name: manage_probuilder
tools.description: Create and edit ProBuilder meshes, shapes, and geometry operations

tools.name: manage_profiler
tools.description: Unity Profiler session control, counter reads, memory snapshots, and Frame Debugger (group: profiling)

tools.name: manage_scene
tools.description: Load, save, query hierarchy, multi-scene editing, templates, validation, and manage Unity scenes

tools.name: manage_script
tools.description: Create, read, and modify C# scripts

tools.name: manage_script_capabilities
tools.description: Query script management capabilities

tools.name: manage_scriptable_object
tools.description: Create and modify ScriptableObjects

tools.name: manage_shader
tools.description: Work with Unity shaders

tools.name: manage_texture
tools.description: Create and modify textures with patterns, gradients, and noise

tools.name: manage_tools
tools.description: Manage which tool groups are visible in this session

tools.name: manage_ui
tools.description: Manage Unity UI Toolkit elements (UXML documents, USS stylesheets, UIDocument components)

tools.name: manage_vfx
tools.description: Manage Visual Effects, particle systems, and trails

tools.name: read_console
tools.description: Read Unity Editor console output (logs, warnings, errors)

tools.name: refresh_unity
tools.description: Refresh Unity Editor asset database

tools.name: run_tests
tools.description: Run Unity Test Framework tests

tools.name: script_apply_edits
tools.description: Apply code edits to C# scripts with validation

tools.name: set_active_instance
tools.description: Set the active Unity Editor instance for multi-instance workflows

tools.name: unity_docs
tools.description: Fetch Unity documentation (ScriptReference, Manual, package docs)

tools.name: unity_reflect
tools.description: Inspect Unity C# APIs via live reflection

tools.name: validate_script
tools.description: Validate C# script syntax and compilation
